name: Tangerines with Honey-Lime Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a vegetable peeler, cut the zest (colored part of the peel) from the limes.
2. Combine the zest with water and sugar in a small saucepan. Heat to boiling, then boil for 10 minutes. Remove the syrup from heat.
3. Cut away the peel and white pith from the tangerines. Place the tangerines in a shallow serving bowl.
4. Squeeze the juice from the limes and mix with rum and honey. Pour this mixture into the lime syrup and stir to blend.
5. Pour the syrup over the tangerines.
6. Refrigerate, covered, turning occasionally, for at least 8 hours.
7. To serve, remove strips of lime zest and garnish with julienned lime zest.
